title: Personal Reader State, Idempotent Commands, Bulk Results, and Conflicts · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in consistent private reader-state service and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debu…
objectives: Model read, unread, star, hide, save, tag, and note relationships by principal, tenant, and entry without changing shared content.
Accept explicit desired state with idempotency and optional version preconditions instead of ambiguous toggles.
Define bounded atomic or per-item bulk behavior with authorization, typed results, retry identity, and complete reconciliation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Personal State Scope
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 4702 during an inclusive cross-device research reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove private reader state, idempotent desired commands, bulk results, conflicts, and count repair; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then change one tenant, cursor, reader command, authorization, validator, sanitizer, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model read, unread, star, hide, save, tag, and note relationships by principal, tenant, and entry without changing shared content.

Inspect the Feed Ts Personal State Scope trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
